_comment: Run with a FILM on the tip side: requires a mesh with include_film_tip=true (create it with the mesher, GUI or geom.json). The 'films' block assigns the fixed charge of each film present in the mesh; its order = ramp order. 'type' uses the catalog (0.66M/1M/2M/4M) or 'molar_charge' a free value in M. NOTE: highly charged film + dilute electrolyte may not converge -> raise n_steps and/or n_steps_film (see README).
